REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IN OPPOSITION TO DEMURRER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GLOBAL ASSET CAPITAL LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT GOODIN, MACBRIDE SQUERI, DAY & LAMPREY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED, TEN DAYS TO ANSWER. EVEN HAD IT BEEN FILED, THE SUBSTITUTION OF COUNSEL FORM DOES NOT NECESSARILY CONTRADICT PLAINTIFF'S ALLEGATION THAT DEFENDANT REPRESENTED PLAINTIFF CONTINUOUSLY UNTIL JULY 19, 2006, WHICH THE COURT MUST ACCEPT AS TRUE FOR PURPOSES OF THIS DEMURRER. ORDER SIGNED IN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-10-2007 Set For Order To Show Cause On Dec-03-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motioon And Motion For Order Compelling Responses, Deemeing Matters Admitted And Awarding Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-10-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED.
Defendant's GOODIN, MACBRIDE SQUERI, DAY & LAMPREY'S Motion For Order Compelling Responses, Deeming Matters Admitted is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to respond to Defendant's First Inspection Demand, First Set of Form Interrogatories, and First Set of Special Interrogatories within 15 days of notice of this order. Defendant's Request For Admissions are deemed admitted. Sanctions are imposed against Plaintiff in the amount of $875, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: WILLIAM GWIRE, ESQUIRE (GWIRE LAW OFFICES, 415.296.8880 X13) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF AND OPPOSING PARTY.
THOMAS V. LORAN III, ESQUIRE (PILLSBURY WINTHROP SHAW PITTMAN LLP, 415.983.1000) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY GOODIN, MACBRIDE, SQUERI, DAY & LAMPREY.

RULING: A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT GOODIN, MACBRIDE SQUERI, DAY & LAMPREY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED, TEN DAYS TO ANSWER. EVEN HAD IT BEEN FILED, THE SUBSTITUTION OF COUNSEL FORM DOES NOT NECESSARILY CONTRADICT PLAINTIFF'S ALLEGATION THAT DEFENDANT REPRESENTED PLAINTIFF CONTINUOUSLY UNTIL JULY 19, 2006, WHICH THE COURT MUST ACCEPT AS TRUE FOR PURPOSES OF THIS DEMURRER. ORDER SIGNED IN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB/X-DS)
